# telemetry_query module constants
HAS_DUCKDB = True
TRACE_WINDOW_MINUTES = 5

# telemetry_query public function / class signatures
query_corrections(*, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, corrections_file: pathlib.Path | None = None, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
query_errors(*, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, errors_file: pathlib.Path | None = None, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
query_sessions(*, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, sessions_file: pathlib.Path | None = None, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
query_skill_counts(*, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, min_count: int = 1, usage_file: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
query_usage(*, project: str | None = None, include_unknown: bool = False, usage_file: pathlib.Path | None = None, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
query_usage_by_skill_session(skill_name: str, *, project: str | None = None, usage_file: pathlib.Path | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
query_workflows(*, workflows_file: pathlib.Path | None = None, since: str | None = None, until: str | None = None) -> List[Dict[str, Any]]
